candidates.title: Men's Aurion 3L Ski Pant – blackcrows
candidates.snippet: Designed for movement, with perfect functionality and a focus on breathability and strength, the Aurion 3L pants, made with the Toray Dermizax 20K / 20K membrane, invite you to explore the mountains.

candidates.title: Men's Crista 3L Bib Ski Pant – blackcrows
candidates.snippet: Bibs were originally designed as workwear to be robust, practical, and comfortable. We've added extreme protection and breathability, thanks to the 3L Toray Dermizax 20K / 10K membrane, not to mention a touch of elegance to shine in company.
